title: trifolium hybridum subsp. elegans
intro: Trifolium hybridum subsp. elegans, also known as the elegant white clover, is a subspecies of the white clover plant that is native to Europe and Asia. The elegant white clover has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. It has been used to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. The elegant white clover can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
